tasks.subject: Task 1: Project Setup & Build Configuration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the Android project skeleton with all dependencies correctly wired.

**Files:**
- Create: `gradle/libs.versions.toml`
- Modify: `build.gradle.kts` (root)
- Modify: `app/build.gradle.kts`
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/XDownloaderApp.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew assembleDebug` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["gradle/libs.versions.toml", "build.gradle.kts", "app/build.gradle.kts"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["assembleDebug succeeds", "all dependencies resolve", "KSP runs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Quality Parser Utility
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure function extracting quality label from Twitter video URLs.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/util/QualityParser.kt`
- Create: `app/src/test/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/util/QualityParserTest.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "*.QualityParserTest"` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/util/QualityParser.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"*.QualityParserTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["landscape URL → height as quality", "portrait URL → min dimension", "no-resolution URL → fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Cobalt API Client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Retrofit interface + models + CobaltRepository covering all Cobalt response types.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/remote/model/CobaltRequest.kt`
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/remote/model/CobaltResponse.kt`
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/remote/CobaltApi.kt`
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/remote/CobaltRepository.kt`
- Create: `app/src/test/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/remote/CobaltRepositoryTest.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "*.CobaltRepositoryTest"` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/remote/CobaltRepository.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"*.CobaltRepositoryTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["picker → multiple VideoVariant", "stream → single VideoVariant", "error → Result.failure", "network error → Result.failure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Room Database
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DownloadEntity, DownloadDao, AppDatabase with in-memory Room tests.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/db/DownloadEntity.kt`
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/db/DownloadDao.kt`
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/db/AppDatabase.kt`
- Create: `app/src/test/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/DownloadDaoTest.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "*.DownloadDaoTest"` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/db/DownloadEntity.kt", "app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/db/DownloadDao.kt", "app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/data/local/db/AppDatabase.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"*.DownloadDaoTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["insert and retrieve", "update status", "flowAll emits", "delete removes row"]}
```


tasks.subject: Task 6: Notification Helper

tasks.subject: Task 7: Download Worker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** DownloadWorker inserts Room row, downloads via OkHttp, updates status.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/worker/DownloadWorker.kt`
- Create: `app/src/test/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/worker/DownloadWorkerTest.kt`

**Verify:** `./gradlew test --tests "*.DownloadWorkerTest"` → `BUILD SUCCESSFUL`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/worker/DownloadWorker.kt"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew test --tests \"*.DownloadWorkerTest\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["inserts DOWNLOADING row", "updates COMPLETED on success", "retry on 500", "FAILED on error"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/java/com/cyrillesondag/xdownloader/di/"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew assembleDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["assembleDebug succeeds", "no Hilt MissingBinding errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: AndroidManifest & Final Integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AndroidManifest with share intent filter, permissions, end-to-end smoke test.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml`
- Modify: `app/src/main/res/values/themes.xml`

**Verify:** Install on device → share X video tweet → download completes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml"], "verifyCommand": "./gradlew installDebug", "acceptanceCriteria": ["share intent shows app", "BottomSheet with quality options", "download completes", "video saved to folder"]}
```
